mapper.sql: id, username, password, real_name, status, deleted, login_fail_count, lock_time, created_at, updated_at, created_by, updated_by
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE username = #{username} AND deleted = 0

SELECT u.id, u.username, u.password, u.real_name, u.status, u.deleted, u.login_fail_count, u.lock_time, u.created_at, u.updated_at, u.created_by, u.updated_by, r.id AS role_id, r.role_code AS role_role_code, r.role_name AS role_role_name, r.status AS role_status, r.deleted AS role_deleted, r.created_at AS role_created_at, r.updated_at AS role_updated_at, r.created_by AS role_created_by, r.updated_by AS role_updated_by FROM sys_user u LEFT JOIN sys_user_role ur ON u.id = ur.user_id LEFT JOIN sys_role r ON ur.role_id = r.id AND r.deleted = 0 WHERE u.id = #{id} AND u.deleted = 0
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (username, password, real_name, status, deleted, login_fail_count, lock_time, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{username}, #{password}, #{realName}, #{status}, 0, 0, NULL, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET real_name = #{realName}, status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status}, updated_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy} WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_user u
u.deleted = 0
AND u.username LIKE CONCAT('%', #{username}, '%')
AND u.status = #{status}
ORDER BY u.created_at DESC
SELECT role_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT user_id FROM sys_user_role WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO sys_user_role (user_id, role_id, created_by, updated_by) VALUES
(#{userId}, #{roleId}, #{createdBy}, #{updatedBy})
